programme.title: BKFC Fight Night: Clearwater - Gaskins vs. Guymon

programme.title: BKFC Fight Night - Newcastle: Terrill vs. McFarlane
programme.desc: Mick Terrill vs. Ghost McFarlane, heavyweight title bout. From Newcastle, U.K.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Bantamweight champion Sergio Pettis defends his belt from Rizin champ Kyoji Horiguchi. From Dec. 3, 2021 at Mohegan Sun Arena in Uncasville, Conn.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Heavyweight champ Ryan Bader returns to the division following his run in the Light Heavyweight World Grand Prix to take on interim heavyweight kingpin Valentin Moldavsky in a unification bout; Darrion Caldwell faces Enrique Barzola.

programme.title: Extreme Fighting Championship 131: Michael vs. Bandu
programme.desc: From GrandWest Grand Arena in Cape Town, South Africa.

programme.title: Coach and Company
programme.desc: Jonathan Coachman hosts this no-holds-barred daily sports talk show. "The Coach" leads dynamic discussions with a rotating cast of all-star analysts and sports insiders.

programme.desc: From Grayson Stadium in Savannah, Ga.

programme.desc: From Grayson Stadium in Savannah, Ga.

programme.desc: Featuring Kai Stewart vs. Nico Gaffie, Rosalinda Rodriguez vs. Shelby Cannon, plus more in bare-knuckle boxing action from Hollywood, Fla.

programme.title: Bare Knuckle Fighting Championship
programme.desc: From Feb. 5, 2021 From RP Funding Center in Lakeland, Fla.

programme.title: BKFC 57
programme.desc: Ryan Reber vs. Derek Perez, bantamweight; Stephen Townsel vs. Leo Bercier, cruiserweight; Matt Russo vs. Justin Street, flyweight. From Hollywood, Fla.

programme.desc: From March 21, 2025, at Melrose Ballroom in Queens, N.Y.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Standout grapplers Storley and Gracie swing for the fences in the Bellator 274 headliner.

programme.desc: All the classic mixed martial arts and kickboxing action from Bellator, featuring some of the best fighters in the world.

programme.title: BKFC: KnuckleMania 2
programme.desc: Features Luis Palomino vs. Martin Brown for BKFC lightweight title, Chad Mendes vs. Joshua Alvarez. Plus Mike Perry vs. Julian Lane in bare knuckle boxing action from Hollywood, Fla. From Feb. 19, 2022.

programme.desc: BKFC 58 features a stacked card from Sofia, Bulgaria.

programme.title: The Bare Knuckle Show

programme.title: TCL Team Boxing League
programme.desc: From Red Owl Boxing Arena in Houston.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: No. 2-ranked featherweight Adam Borics meets Mads Burnell in the main event. Plus, a light heavyweight bout between Phil Davis and Julius Anglickas. From the Family Arena in St. Louis, March 12, 2022.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Unbeaten featherweight champ A.J. McKee battles former top pound-for-pound and two-division champ Patricio Pitbull in one of the most anticipated rematches of all time. Plus, 205-pound champ Vadim Nemkov vs. Corey Anderson.

programme.title: No Gamble, No Future

programme.title: Failure is an Option

programme.desc: Let’s retrofit a mountain bike with a jet engine and see how fast I can go uphill!

programme.sub-title: Unlocked the Secrets of Performance Enhancing Helium
programme.desc: What if the secret to running faster, jumping higher, is a naturally occurring gas that’s cheaply available?
